story.iWant: to create personal projects that only I can access
story.soThat: I can keep my private workflows separate from team collaboration.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: **AC-1.1: Project type field** - Projects have a `type` field with values 'personal' or 'shared' (stored in database, exposed via API).
**AC-1.2: Single-member enforcement** - Personal projects enforce single-member constraint (only the owner can be a member); attempting to add members to personal projects is rejected.
**AC-1.3: Type-based sidebar grouping** - Personal projects appear under "My Projects" section header; shared projects appear under "Shared Projects" section header in the project sidebar.
**AC-1.4: Personal-to-shared upgrade** - Personal projects can be upgraded to shared projects by adding a member (requires confirmation dialog); downgrade from shared to personal is prohibited.

**AC-1.5: Project isolation enforced** - Workflows in personal projects cannot access shared project files; workflows in shared projects cannot access personal project files; storage boundaries enforced via Epic 10's capability-based sandboxing.

constraints.constraint: IPC communication patterns between main and renderer processes
